title: Welcome
snippet: IntroductionHello and welcome to my portfolio where you get a glimpse of my programming skills!You can expect to find the following on this site: Education Technical Skills My Coding ExamplesEducationUniversity of ZurichI’m currently pursuing my bachelor’s in Computational Linguistics and Media Research at the University of Zurich.Main Courses taken Mathematical Foundation of Computational Linguistics Programming Techniques in Computational Linguistics I & II Statistics and Data Analysis: IntroductionKantonsschule Zurich NordI graduated from the Kantonsschule Zurich Nord with ‘Economics and Law’ as my profile.The title for my final thesis was ‘IT-Forensiker vs. Künstliche Intelligenz: Wer ist besser?’.Technical Skills Programming Languages: Python, SQL Coding with Data Formats: XML, CSV, JSON Code Hosting Platforms: GitHub, GitLabMy Coding ExamplesUnder the tab Coding Examples you can find some of my more complex codes that I have programmedduring the second semester of my bachelor’s.
